metadata.role: Expose the legacy FSM demonstration surface
metadata.responsibility: Keep the historical top-level ASAP\Fsm facade available while runtime execution remains owned by StateMachine.
contracts: The facade provides demonstration metadata only.
Runtime transition execution belongs to StateMachine.
The facade must not route, render, authorize or execute unrelated business logic.

metadata.role: Expose a minimal FSM demonstration flow
metadata.behavior: Returns deterministic demo data that documents a minimal START to DONE workflow without executing a runtime transition.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned array contains states, signals and initial keys.
The returned data is static demonstration metadata only.

metadata.role: Expose the RefBook domain for the legacy FSM facade
metadata.behavior: Returns the stable RefBook domain used by scanners, snapshots and ASAP_REF_BOOK renderers.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned domain is FSM.

metadata.role: Define one explicit finite-state machine signal
metadata.responsibility: Carry a stable signal identifier used to select declared transitions from the current FSM state.
contracts: The signal identifier is non-empty after trimming.
The signal definition does not mutate state.
The object is immutable after construction.

metadata.role: Create an immutable FSM signal definition
metadata.behavior: Trims and validates a signal identifier before storing it as explicit transition-selection metadata.
preconditions: The provided signal identifier is a string.
postconditions: The stored signal identifier is non-empty.
The object remains immutable after construction.

metadata.role: Read the stable FSM signal identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the validated signal identifier carried by this immutable definition.
preconditions: The SignalDefinition has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned identifier is non-empty.

metadata.role: Expose the RefBook domain for FSM signal definitions
metadata.behavior: Returns the stable RefBook domain used by scanners, snapshots and ASAP_REF_BOOK renderers.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned domain is FSM.

metadata.role: Define the callable boundary for FSM transition actions
metadata.responsibility: Constrain transition side effects to explicit objects executed by StateMachine after transition validation.
contracts: Actions do not select transitions.
Actions receive the validated transition and current StateMemory.
Actions must expose failures explicitly and must not silently ignore errors.

metadata.role: Execute one declared FSM transition action
metadata.behavior: Runs an explicit side effect after StateMachine has selected and validated a transition.
preconditions: The transition argument has already been selected by StateMachine.
The memory argument belongs to the active StateMachine instance.
postconditions: Any mutation is limited to the provided StateMemory or explicit failure is raised.
side_effects: May mutate the provided StateMemory only.

metadata.role: Define one explicit finite-state machine state
metadata.responsibility: Carry a stable state identifier and human-readable label used by StateMachine definitions.
contracts: The state identifier is non-empty after trimming.
The label never participates in transition selection.
The object is immutable after construction.

metadata.role: Create an immutable FSM state definition
metadata.behavior: Normalizes the state identifier, validates that it is not empty and stores a label for human-readable documentation.
preconditions: The provided state identifier must not be empty after trimming.
postconditions: The state identifier is stable and non-empty.
The label equals the provided label or the state identifier when no label is provided.

metadata.role: Read the stable FSM state identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the normalized identifier used by TransitionDefinition and StateMachine transition lookup.
preconditions: The StateDefinition has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned identifier is non-empty.

metadata.role: Read the human-readable FSM state label
metadata.behavior: Returns the label used for documentation, diagnostics or UI display without changing transition semantics.
preconditions: The StateDefinition has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned label is stable for this object.

metadata.role: Expose the RefBook domain for FSM state definitions
metadata.behavior: Returns the stable RefBook domain used by scanners, snapshots and ASAP_REF_BOOK renderers.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned domain is FSM.

metadata.role: Execute explicit finite-state machine transitions
metadata.responsibility: Own the current state, validate incoming signals and apply only declared transitions.
contracts: No fallback state is created.
No implicit transition is accepted.
Transition actions are explicit StateActionInterface objects.
The current state changes only after a declared transition has been validated.

metadata.role: Create a state machine from declared states and transitions
metadata.behavior: Indexes state and transition definitions, validates the initial state and creates isolated FSM memory for this runtime instance.
preconditions: Every state entry is a StateDefinition instance.
Every transition entry is a TransitionDefinition instance.
The initial state identifier exists in the declared state set.
postconditions: The current state equals the validated initial state.
The state machine owns a fresh StateMemory instance.
Declared transitions are addressable by their stable key.
side_effects: Initializes runtime state and memory for this object only.

metadata.role: Apply one signal to the current state
metadata.behavior: Looks up the declared transition for current state and signal, executes its optional action, updates the current state and returns a TransitionResult.
preconditions: The signal is a declared transition signal for the current state.
The target state exists in the declared state set.
postconditions: The current state equals the transition target state.
The returned TransitionResult reports previous state, signal and next state.
No state is changed when the transition is not allowed.
side_effects: Mutates the current state on success.
May execute the declared StateActionInterface action.

metadata.role: Read the current FSM state identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the validated state identifier currently owned by this StateMachine instance.
preconditions: The StateMachine has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned value is one of the declared state identifiers.

metadata.role: Expose the FSM memory object for declared actions
metadata.behavior: Returns the controlled memory container owned by this StateMachine instance.
preconditions: The StateMachine has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The same StateMemory instance is returned for this runtime object.

metadata.role: Expose the RefBook domain for the FSM runtime
metadata.behavior: Returns the stable RefBook domain used by scanners, snapshots and ASAP_REF_BOOK renderers.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned domain is FSM.

metadata.role: Represent explicit FSM contract and runtime failures
metadata.responsibility: Carry stable FSM error codes and human-readable failure details without silent fallback.
contracts: Invalid FSM operations fail explicitly.
Stable FSM error codes remain distinguishable from generic exceptions.
The exception builder keeps the stable code as message prefix.

metadata.role: Create an explicit FSM contract exception
metadata.behavior: Builds a StateMachineException whose message starts with a stable FSM error code followed by the failure detail.
preconditions: The code name is a stable FSM error code.
The detail explains the human-readable failure cause.
postconditions: The returned exception message begins with the stable error code.

metadata.role: Expose the RefBook domain for FSM exceptions
metadata.behavior: Returns the stable RefBook domain used by scanners, snapshots and ASAP_REF_BOOK renderers.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned domain is FSM.

metadata.role: Hold explicit memory values for one FSM runtime instance
metadata.responsibility: Provide controlled key/value storage for StateMachine actions without owning transition selection.
contracts: Memory keys must be explicit non-empty strings.
Missing keys fail explicitly.
The memory object does not decide transitions or create fallback states.

metadata.role: Export explicit FSM memory values
metadata.behavior: Returns the current memory map for diagnostics, reports or controlled consumers.
preconditions: The StateMemory instance exists.
postconditions: The returned array mirrors current memory values.

metadata.role: Read one explicit FSM memory value
metadata.behavior: Returns the value stored under an existing memory key and fails explicitly when the key is absent.
preconditions: The requested key exists in memory.
postconditions: The stored value is returned without modifying memory.

metadata.role: Expose the RefBook domain for FSM memory
metadata.behavior: Returns the stable RefBook domain used by scanners, snapshots and ASAP_REF_BOOK renderers.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned domain is FSM.

metadata.role: Set one explicit FSM memory value
metadata.behavior: Validates the memory key and stores the provided value for later retrieval by declared FSM actions.
preconditions: The memory key must not be empty after trimming.
postconditions: The key exists in memory and maps to the provided value.

metadata.role: Define one declared finite-state machine transition
metadata.responsibility: Bind source state, signal, target state and optional action into an immutable transition definition.
contracts: Source state, signal and target state are explicit non-empty identifiers.
The transition definition does not execute side effects by itself.
The transition key is derived only from source state and signal.

metadata.role: Create an immutable FSM transition definition
metadata.behavior: Normalizes and validates source state, signal and target state, then stores an optional explicit action object.
preconditions: Source state identifier is non-empty after trimming.
Signal identifier is non-empty after trimming.
Target state identifier is non-empty after trimming.
postconditions: The transition can be selected by StateMachine using its stable key.
The optional action is stored without being executed.

metadata.role: Read the optional FSM transition action
metadata.behavior: Returns the explicit action object that StateMachine may execute after validating this transition.
preconditions: The TransitionDefinition has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned value is either null or a StateActionInterface instance.

metadata.role: Read the source FSM state identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the state identifier from which this transition may be selected.
preconditions: The TransitionDefinition has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned identifier is non-empty.

metadata.role: Build the stable FSM transition lookup key
metadata.behavior: Returns the key used by StateMachine to find the transition matching current state and signal.
preconditions: The TransitionDefinition has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned key is source state, separator and signal.

metadata.role: Expose the RefBook domain for FSM transition definitions
metadata.behavior: Returns the stable RefBook domain used by scanners, snapshots and ASAP_REF_BOOK renderers.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned domain is FSM.

metadata.role: Read the FSM transition signal identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the signal that must be applied while the StateMachine is in the source state.
preconditions: The TransitionDefinition has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned signal is non-empty.

metadata.role: Read the target FSM state identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the state identifier reached when this transition is successfully applied.
preconditions: The TransitionDefinition has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned identifier is non-empty.

metadata.role: Represent a successful FSM transition outcome
metadata.responsibility: Carry previous state, applied signal and next state after StateMachine validation.
contracts: A TransitionResult is created only for a successful transition.
It contains no hidden fallback state.
It is immutable after construction.

metadata.role: Create an immutable FSM transition result
metadata.behavior: Stores previous state, applied signal and next state after a successful StateMachine transition.
preconditions: The caller has already validated and applied the transition.
postconditions: The result exposes transition outcome values without mutating the FSM.

metadata.role: Read the previous FSM state identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the state from which the successful transition started.
preconditions: The TransitionResult has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned value is stable for this result object.

metadata.role: Expose the RefBook domain for FSM transition results
metadata.behavior: Returns the stable RefBook domain used by scanners, snapshots and ASAP_REF_BOOK renderers.
preconditions: none
postconditions: The returned domain is FSM.

metadata.role: Read the applied FSM signal identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the signal that triggered the successful transition.
preconditions: The TransitionResult has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned value is stable for this result object.

metadata.role: Read the next FSM state identifier
metadata.behavior: Returns the state reached by the successful transition.
preconditions: The TransitionResult has been successfully constructed.
postconditions: The returned value is stable for this result object.
